description_long: This object consists of two large, symmetrical obelisks made of reddish-brown stone, each with a square base and tapering sides, set on a stepped, polygonal stone platform. The obelisks are positioned parallel to each other, with a small rectangular plaque or stone between them on the platform. The surfaces of the obelisks feature vertical panels with what appear to be engraved or painted motifs, possibly hieroglyphs or decorative reliefs. The base is multi-tiered, with each tier slightly larger than the one above, creating a layered effect. The entire structure sits on an irregularly shaped slab that mimics stone paving, suggesting it is part of a larger monument or memorial installation.
description: A pair of reddish-brown stone obelisks with engraved panels, set on a stepped polygonal platform and surrounded by stone paving. Decorative motifs and a central plaque enhance its monumental appearance.
description_view_0: Two obelisks with smooth, angled faces and a stepped base are visible, with the central gap and platform clearly shown.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the height and symmetry of the obelisks, with the layered base and stone paving extending outward.
description_view_2: Obelisks are seen from the opposite side, showing more detail on the engraved panels and the central plaque between them.
description_view_3: Rear view emphasizing the decorative panels on the obelisks and the full extent of the polygonal base and surrounding paving.
attribute_inscription: Vertical panels on the obelisks display what appear to be engraved or painted motifs, possibly hieroglyphs or symbolic designs, located on the faces of both obelisks. The style is reminiscent of ancient Egyptian or commemorative inscriptions, but the language and legibility are not clearly discernible.
attribute_ornamentation: Decorative motifs or reliefs are present on the vertical panels of the obelisks, featuring geometric or symbolic patterns. These are located on the main faces of each obelisk and add a historical or commemorative character.
attribute_base_design: The base is a multi-tiered, polygonal platform made of stone, with each tier slightly larger than the one above. The design is simple but monumental, with clean lines and a central rectangular plaque or stone between the obelisks.
attribute_tip_design: The tips of the obelisks are sharply pointed and unadorned, maintaining a classic obelisk silhouette with a smooth, matte finish.
attribute_surrounding_features: The obelisks are set on an irregularly shaped stone-paved slab that extends beyond the base, suggesting integration with a larger paved area or plaza. No additional features such as fences, statues, or vegetation are visible.
